entries.statement: Ability to calibrate risk assessment depth and rigor to the materiality and complexity of the model or AI system under review, allocating assessment resources proportionally to actual risk.
Ability to maintain independence and objectivity when challenging models developed by senior or politically influential teams, providing effective challenge regardless of organizational dynamics.
Ability to synthesize risk findings across multiple models and AI systems into coherent enterprise-level risk narratives suitable for senior management and board reporting.

Ability to adapt risk management frameworks designed for traditional quantitative models to the unique characteristics of AI and ML systems, including foundation models, ensemble methods, and deep learning architectures.
